the history of this method.
Origin of Kunda multiplication method
From where, from which book, at which period, Kunda
multiplication method originated? Do sages support it?
The author of Prasnamarga presents Varaha hora (Brihat
jataka) and Krishneeya as authentic texts. If so, is it possible
that he will present a method that is not supported by these
texts for the crucial thing such as rectification of B T? There
should be some indication about this method in these texts
for sure, we assume, and start our search. We can find that it
is Brihatjataka itself that provides the idea of Kunda method
and the same was presented clearly by Prasnamarga. I will
explain. In Brihat Jataka there is a sloka-
